title: Medical Tourism
description: Access world-class healthcare in India and across Asia. Connect with leading specialists for complex treatments.
description_fr: Accédez à des soins de santé de classe mondiale en Inde et en Asie. Connectez-vous avec des spécialistes de premier plan.
description_pt: Aceda a cuidados de saúde de classe mundial na Índia e em toda a Ásia. Ligue-se a especialistas de renome.
fullDescription: Equator Bridges Partners connects African patients with premier medical facilities in India, UAE, and other Asian hubs. We ensure high-quality care, coordination, and cost-effective medical solutions.
fullDescription_fr: Equator Bridges Partners connecte les patients africains aux meilleurs hôpitaux en Inde et aux Émirats Arabes Unis.
fullDescription_pt: Equator Bridges Partners liga pacientes africanos a instalações médicas de primeira linha na Índia e Emirados Árabes Unidos.

title: Education Consultancy
description: Your academic future abroad starts here. Expert guidance for admissions in top Asian universities.
description_fr: Votre avenir académique commence ici. Conseils experts pour les admissions dans les universités asiatiques.
description_pt: O seu futuro académico começa aqui. Orientação especializada para admissões em universidades asiáticas.
fullDescription: From choosing the right course to securing scholarship opportunities, our education consultants provide end-to-end support for African students aspiring to study in India, China, Malaysia, and beyond.
fullDescription_fr: Du choix du cours à l'obtention de bourses, nous soutenons les étudiants africains souhaitant étudier à l'étranger.
fullDescription_pt: Desde a escolha do curso até à obtenção de bolsas, apoiamos estudantes africanos que pretendem estudar no estrangeiro.

title: Business Facilitation
description: Bridge the gap between African markets and Asian trade opportunities. Expand your business reach.
description_fr: Comblez le fossé entre les marchés africains et les opportunités commerciales en Asie.
description_pt: Ponte entre os mercados africanos e as oportunidades comerciais na Ásia.
fullDescription: We act as your on-ground partner for business setup, company registration, and supply chain management across Asian markets (China, UAE, India).
fullDescription_fr: Nous sommes votre partenaire sur place pour la création d'entreprise et la gestion de la chaîne d'approvisionnement en Asie.
fullDescription_pt: Somos o seu parceiro local para a criação de empresas e gestão da cadeia de abastecimento na Ásia.

title: Cargo & Logistics
description: Seamless door-to-door shipping solutions from Asia to Africa. Reliable, fast, and secure.
description_fr: Solutions d'expédition porte-à-porte fluides de l'Asie vers l'Afrique. Fiable et sécurisé.
description_pt: Soluções de envio porta-a-porta da Ásia para a África. Fiável e seguro.
fullDescription: Specialized in large-scale logistics and personal parcel shipments. We provide cost-effective air and sea freight options for all your business needs.
fullDescription_fr: Spécialisé dans la logistique à grande échelle et les envois de colis personnels.
fullDescription_pt: Especializada em logística de grande escala e envios de encomendas pessoais.

title: Catering & Hospitality
description: Premium catering and event management for corporate and personal celebrations.
description_fr: Gestion de restauration et d'événements haut de gamme pour les célébrations d'entreprise.
description_pt: Gestão de catering e eventos premium para celebrações corporativas e pessoais.
fullDescription: Experience the fusion of African and Asian hospitality. From corporate catering to staffing solutions for premium hotels and events.
fullDescription_fr: Découvrez la fusion de l'hospitalité africaine et asiatique.
fullDescription_pt: Experimente a fusão da hospitalidade africana e asiática.

title: Travel & Event Management
description: Curated travel experiences and seamless event planning for businesses and families.
description_fr: Expériences de voyage curatées et planification d'événements pour les entreprises.
description_pt: Experiências de viagem personalizadas e planeamento de eventos para empresas e famílias.
fullDescription: Specializing in corporate retreats, trade fair delegations, and family holiday packages between Africa and Asia.
fullDescription_fr: Spécialisé dans les séminaires d'entreprise et les délégations de foires commerciales.
fullDescription_pt: Especializada em retiros corporativos e delegações de feiras comerciais.

title: Medical Training
description: Advanced medical training and certification programs for healthcare professionals in top Asian institutions.
description_fr: Programmes avancés de formation médicale pour les professionnels de la santé.
description_pt: Programas avançados de formação médica para profissionais de saúde.
fullDescription: We partner with leading medical universities and hospitals in Asia to offer specialized training, fellowships, and observational programs for African doctors, nurses, and technicians.
fullDescription_fr: Nous collaborons avec des universités médicales de premier plan en Asie.
fullDescription_pt: Fazemos parcerias com as principais universidades médicas da Ásia.

title: Technical Training
description: Industrial and technical skill development programs bridging African workforce with Asian expertise.
description_fr: Programmes de développement de compétences techniques pour la main-d'œuvre africaine.
description_pt: Programas de desenvolvimento de competências técnicas para a força de trabalho africana.
fullDescription: From engineering to IT and manufacturing, we facilitate technical training programs that equip the African workforce with cutting-edge skills and certifications from recognized industry leaders in Asia.
fullDescription_fr: Nous facilitons des programmes de formation technique de pointe.
fullDescription_pt: Facilitamos programas de formação técnica de ponta.
